it:9.3: "Lobhaṁ, bhikkhave, anabhijānaṁ aparijānaṁ tattha cittaṁ avirājayaṁ appajahaṁ abhabbo dukkhakkhayāya. Lobhañca kho, bhikkhave, abhijānaṁ parijānaṁ tattha cittaṁ virājayaṁ pajahaṁ bhabbo dukkhakkhayāyā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:9.5:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Navamaṁ.
